Why It Works

5 Reasons the Lift + Elasticity System
Actually Works

01

Gua Sha Targets the Real Cause of Sagging

Sagging isn't just collagen loss — it's tight, stuck fascia pulling the skin down. The Empress Stone releases those adhesions with precision. Visible lift from session one. Results that compound every week.

02

The Oil Repairs Your Barrier and Amplifies Gua Sha

As skin shifts, the barrier breaks down — drier, more reactive, less luminous. The Balm of Gilead Barrier Repair Oil rebuilds it. Vitamin C-rich, hand-harvested resin prized for the "bloom of youth," plus Frankincense and Myrrh. Creates gua sha glide while driving actives deep.

03

Results Are Immediate — and Compound Over Time

Feel it after your first session. After just 2 weeks:

98%
Felt more sculpted
95%
Skin felt lifted
95%
Wrinkles less noticeable
97%
More plump and firm

Based on a 50-person consumer study · 2 weeks of use

04

A Bio Retinol That Won't Irritate Your Skin

Sensitized skin can't always handle conventional retinol. Moonbounce delivers 2% Rock Samphire Bio Retinol — firms and smooths without redness or peeling. Safe daily, AM or PM. Irish Sea Moss repairs elasticity. Marshmallow Root restores the barrier. Named Best Moisturizer 2024.

✓ Best Moisturizer 2024 ✓ No retinol irritation ✓ All skin types
05

Your Skin Heals Overnight — This Helps It Do More

Elevated cortisol inflames the skin and speeds aging. The Cosmic Intervention Mask works against it overnight — Wild Indigo calms inflammation, Butterfly Lavender relaxes tension wrinkles like an injectable. Wake up to plumper, firmer, calmer skin.

✓ Neurocosmetic actives ✓ Nightly use ✓ All skin types

The Daily Ritual · 10–15 Minutes

Lift, Plump & Renew
in 4 Steps

01
Empress Balm of Gilead Barrier Repair Oil
Prepare
Apply to face and neck

Massage onto face and neck daily. Rebuilds barrier, restores elasticity, creates perfect gua sha glide. Active botanicals work on contact.

02
Empress Stone
Sculpt
Perform the gua sha ritual

Glide upward and outward with a light touch. Lifts, sculpts, and de-puffs. Use the precision tip for acupressure. 3–5× per week.

03
Moonbounce Plumping Moisturizer
Plump
Apply morning and/or evening

Apply AM and/or PM to clean skin. Firms, smooths, and deeply hydrates without irritation. Absorbs instantly.

04
Cosmic Intervention Night Repair Mask
Renew
Apply nightly as last step

Last step before sleep. Calms inflammation, relaxes tension wrinkles, repairs overnight. Wake up to firmer, dewy skin.

What's Inside

Ancient Botanicals.
Modern Science.

No synthetics, no fillers, no essential oils. Whole-plant actives with clinical backing and centuries of TCM wisdom behind every formula.

Empress Stone
100% Highest Grade Bian Stone
Artisan-crafted from 40+ minerals. Emits far-infrared waves and ultrasound pulsation for antioxidant and anti-aging benefits. Releases negative ions promoting relaxation and skin vitality.
Empress Balm of Gilead Barrier Repair Oil
Certified Organic · Wild Harvested
Hand-harvested Balm of Gilead resin — prized since the 18th century for preserving the "bloom of youth" — delivers Vitamin C to restore the skin barrier and boost elasticity, while a six-resin nutrient complex actively promotes cellular turnover, evens tone, and visibly reduces wrinkles. Infused with the vibration of Sunstone to uplift mood and restore confidence in your skin.
Moonbounce Plumping Moisturizer
2% Bio Retinol · Best Moisturizer 2024
Rock Samphire (2% Bio Retinol) minimizes wrinkles without irritation. Irish Sea Moss repairs elasticity. Marshmallow Root and Slippery Elm Bark restore the moisture barrier and deliver deep hydration.
Cosmic Intervention Night Repair Mask
Neurocosmetic · Clinically Tested
Wild Indigo reduces cortisol and boosts calming neuropeptides. Butterfly Lavender relaxes tension wrinkles for an injectable-like effect. Peat Moss delivers humic acids and minerals for overnight firmness and morning dewiness.
🪨

Clinically tested neurocosmetic active. Reduces cortisol in the skin, boosts calming neuropeptides, eases inflammation, evens tone, and enhances elasticity for radiant, soothed skin by morning.

Relaxes tension wrinkles with an injectable-like smoothing effect. Boosts hydration to plump and soften the skin's surface overnight — clinical results without the needle.

Common Questions

Everything You
Need to Know

What does the Lift + Elasticity System do for your skin?+
The Lift + Elasticity System is designed to visibly lift, firm, and improve skin elasticity through a combination of gua sha, barrier-repair oils, and bio retinol.
Does gua sha actually lift and firm the face?+
Yes, when practiced consistently, gua sha helps improve circulation, release tension, and support lymphatic movement, which can lead to visibly more lifted, sculpted skin over time. When paired with a complete ritual like this system, results are amplified.
How often should you use gua sha for best results?+
For best results, gua sha should be practiced daily or at least 3–5 times per week, as consistency is key to improving lift, firmness, and overall skin tone over time.
What is bio retinol and how is it different from traditional retinol?+
Bio retinol is a plant-derived alternative to traditional retinol that helps smooth the look of fine lines and improve skin elasticity without the irritation, dryness, or sensitivity often associated with conventional retinol.
Can this system replace Botox or injectables?+
The Lift + Elasticity System is designed as a natural, non-invasive alternative that supports visibly firmer, smoother skin over time, though results are gradual and depend on consistent use rather than immediate effects.
Is this system good for sensitive skin?+
Yes, the Lift + Elasticity System is formulated with biologically compatible, barrier-supportive ingredients and is designed to be gentle, making it suitable for most skin types, including sensitive skin.
Why is a ritual more effective than skincare alone for lifting and firming?+
A ritual combines tools, technique, and biologically compatible skincare to work on both the structure beneath the skin and the skin itself, delivering more visible lifting, sculpting, and firming results than skincare alone.
Can this ritual help skin affected by hormonal changes?+
Yes — this system was designed with exactly this in mind. Hormonal shifts accelerate collagen loss, thin the skin, compromise barrier function, and reduce the skin's ability to retain moisture. The Empress Stone stimulates circulation and releases fascial tension to restore lift. The Balm of Gilead oil rebuilds the barrier and replenishes elasticity. Moonbounce firms without irritation — important when skin becomes more reactive. The Cosmic Intervention mask lowers cortisol in the skin and supports overnight cellular repair, which becomes more critical as hormones shift.
What is your return policy?+
We offer a 30-Day Glow Guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied with your results within 30 days of purchase, reach out to our team and we'll make it right. We stand fully behind the efficacy of this system.
